tasks.label: GSC: commit verification + push
tasks.command: cd ~/Desktop/visitplane && rm -f .git/index.lock && git add app/layout.tsx && git commit -m 'SEO: Add Google Search Console verification' && git push origin main --force && echo '✅ Deployed! Vercel building now.'

tasks.label: SEO: deploy sitemap + robots + layout
tasks.command: cd ~/Desktop/visitplane && rm -f .git/index.lock && git add app/sitemap.ts app/robots.ts app/layout.tsx && git commit -m 'SEO: add dynamic sitemap, robots.txt, GSC verification support' && git push origin main --force && echo '✅ Deployed! Vercel building now.'

tasks.label: Fix: top 20 visa routes + commit + push
tasks.command: cd ~/Desktop/visitplane && node scripts/fix-top-routes.mjs && rm -f .git/index.lock && git add scripts/fix-top-routes.mjs && git commit -m 'Fix: Update top 20 visa routes with accurate data' && git push origin main --force && echo '✅ Deployed! Vercel is building now.'
